name: Double-Cinnamon French Toast
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Whipping cream or half and half
4 slices (3/4-to 1-inch-thick) - Cinnamon bread or egg bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy medium saucepan, bring together the maple syrup, unsalted butter, and cinnamon until boiling.
- Boil for 2 minutes.
2. In a bowl, whisk together the eggs, whipping cream (or half and half), vanilla extract, 3 tablespoons of the maple syrup mixture, and the remaining 1 teaspoon of cinnamon.
3. Place the bread slices in a large baking dish. Pour the egg mixture over the bread, ensuring each slice is coated. Pierce the bread in several places with a fork.
4. Let the bread stand for 5 minutes to absorb some of the egg mixture.
5. Melt 1 tablespoon of unsalted butter in a heavy large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook the bread until browned, about 3 minutes.
- Turn the slices and cook on the other side until browned, about 3 minutes more.
6. Transfer the bread to plates. Serve with additional maple syrup as desired.
Bon Appétit December 1993
